name: Sunset Fishing Trip
description: A relaxing fishing trip along the coast during sunset.
instructions: Arrive at the dock 30 minutes early.
Bring your own fishing rod or rent one on site.
Follow the captain's safety briefing.
Wear non-slip shoes.

name: Weekend Beach Picnic
description: Enjoy a relaxing picnic at the popular West Coast beach area.
Bring your own food and enjoy the scenic view.
instructions: Reserve a picnic table in advance.
Bring sunscreen and insect repellent.
Dispose of trash in designated bins.
Stay hydrated throughout the day.

name: Changi Kayak Adventure
description: Explore the mangroves and coastline of Changi by kayak.
Guided tour with all equipment provided.
Experience the rich biodiversity of the area.
instructions: Wear comfortable clothes that can get wet.
Bring a change of clothes and a towel.
Listen to the guide's instructions before launching.
Apply waterproof sunscreen before departure.

name: Morning Beach Yoga
description: Start your day with a rejuvenating yoga session on the beach.
instructions: Arrive 15 minutes early to set up your mat.
Wear comfortable workout attire.
Bring a water bottle and towel.
Inform the instructor of any injuries.

name: Coastal Photography Tour
description: Capture stunning coastal landscapes and wildlife.
Suitable for amateur and experienced photographers.
instructions: Bring your camera and extra batteries.
Wear comfortable walking shoes.
Meet at the Changi Point Ferry Terminal.
Carry a tripod for sunrise shots.
